title: BTYMS 100 Pieces Disposable Mini Cosmetic Spatula Facial Mask Spatula Small Makeup Scoop Makeup Spatula for Mixing and Sampling (Multi-color)
description:
Mini makeup spatula is perfect for applying the facial mask, peel, serum, healing clay and other skincare products; easy to apply thin layers of skincare products evenly and sampling your beauty products
Hygienic and disposable cosmetic spatulas, suitable for sensitive skin face and body, professional and home use
The handle is comfortable to hold and very lightweight, great for travel and everyday skin care application
Easy to clean, the mini spatula allows for less waste and mess and keeps your cream clean from bacteria
Package includes: 100pcs mini spatula for cosmetic, 100% new products. This mask tip spatula is 5.5 cm long and 1.2 cm wide.
reviews_5s: Perfect. Needed these to apply my daily moisturizer to avoid getting it u see my nails. No more wasted product. These work perfectly. Great price, packaging and product!Bought these for my skin care & lip products. Makes applying my products so convenient & sanitary because I don’t have to keep dipping my fingers in my products now that I have these. Multi-purpose because they are easy to wash and re-use!Will buy again.These little disposable spatulas come in really cute colors. They're great to use for anything I have in tubs/jars. My nails extend past my fingertips and I hate when my moisturizers dip below a certain point where using my fingertips gets moisturizer beneath my nails so these are the perfect way to scoop some out. These are 2" long and 0.5" wide. They are not completely flat straight across, at the tip they're slightly concave, creating a small little dip.I know these are not the most environmentally friendly but I love these! I bought them to not waste my moisturizer or cream by having it get stuck under my nails.Based on the description, I wasn't sure if these mini spatulas would be stiff enough to scoop out thick moisturizers. Fortunately, they are. Also, the various colors not only look nice, but serve a useful purpose: in low lighting, I'm able to distinguish the scoop end of the spatula, thus keeping the other end sterile. For the price, these spatulas are hard to beat!I don't like to create more waste, but these are so helpful when I am applying my moisturizer that comes in a jar. I really don't like getting the gel/cream under my fingernails, so this is such a helpful tool to prevent bacteria from spreading.These are a must if you use multiple creams in jars or share skin products with others. You get enough where you won’t need to repurchase for 1-2 months. Also, the color variations are nice.Good Number of pieces for priceSeems like a product you wouldn’t need but for women with long fingernails it’s a must
reviews_1s: Upon arrival I noticed a foreign body that looked similar to an insect casing inside the bag that the product arrives in. There aren’t any instructions on how to properly sanitize and disinfect before use without melting the spatulas either. I absolutely disagree with “just soap and water” being a sufficient way of sanitizing these. Disgusting. I cannot recommend these for personal or professional useTiny !Very tiny and cute but really small. Great for 2oz jars and smallerJust throw them away
